title: @bleizlabs/ui Component Manifest
description: Single source of truth dla CLI describing every public export of @bleizlabs/ui. Generated by scripts/build-component-manifest.mjs at lib publish time. Validated by scripts/check-manifest.mjs.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Bumps when manifest format itself changes (not on lib version bumps).

libVersion.description: Lib package version at generation time (semver).

categories.description: Map of category name → list of family names (alphabetised). Categories: layout, typography, display, interactive, feedback, specialized, molecules, presets, complex.

components.description: Component families (atoms / molecules / presets / complex). Wrapped by CLI init.

utilities.description: Utility exports (Slot, cn, mergeRefs). Wrapped under _components/ui/utils/.

typesOnly.description: Type-only re-exports (no runtime). Re-exported through wrapper barrel as type-only.

family.description: Family name (folder name in lib components/<category>/<family>/).

isClient.description: True IFF the family's primary file (first .tsx referenced from family index) contains a top-of-file 'use client' (or "use client") directive. Optional — populated for `components` only (utilities + typesOnly omit). Schema-additive.

summary.description: First JSDoc sentence (≤120 chars target, hard cap 240 for safety) of the family's primary file. Used by 0.25.0+ agent docs inventory table. Optional — populated for `components` only.

exports.description: Component / value exports (functions, classes, primitives — anything runtime).

types.description: Type-only exports (interfaces, type aliases). Re-exported via 'export type {...}'.

hooks.description: React hook exports (lowercase 'use' prefix). Listed separately for CLI to handle hook re-export semantics.
